tools.name: fitness_log_workout
tools.description: Log a workout entry with exercise details. Use when the user tells you about a workout, exercise session, or physical activity they completed.

workout_type.description: Type of workout (e.g. strength, cardio, yoga, cycling, swimming).

exercise.description: Name of the exercise or activity.

reps.description: Reps per set (or total reps for bodyweight).

weight_kg.description: Weight used in kilograms, if applicable.

duration_min.description: Duration in minutes, for cardio or time-based activities.
